mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with declining unemployment signals robust labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS > 150k and UNRATE < 4.0%

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing activity that supports corporate profits, generating positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases by >2% but SPX 5d returns are negative in 50%+ of cases

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts combined with rising retail sales indicate elevated consumer demand that drives corporate revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative in 60%+ of instances where both HOUST > 1200k and RSAFS > 450k

mechanism_narrative: Persistent low inflation (CPI) reduces the likelihood of monetary tightening, maintaining favorable discount rate conditions for equities and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in 50%+ of periods where CPIAUCSL < 2.0%

mechanism_narrative: Weak GDP growth signals economic stagnation that increases the probability of monetary stimulus, creating positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative in 50%+ of instances where GDPC1 growth < 1.5% annualized

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in unemployment rate indicates deteriorating labor market conditions that trigger risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are positive in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE rises > 0.5pp in 1 month

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production signals weakening manufacturing activity that reduces corporate earnings expectations, generating negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO declines > 1.5% in 1 month
